overview.title: What Is SSVID YouTube Shorts Downloader?
overview.description: SSVID is a free online tool that helps you download YouTube Shorts videos for offline viewing. Shorts are designed in a vertical format, so SSVID focuses on keeping the original 9:16 portrait layout for a better mobile viewing experience. You can also use the SSVID homepage to access all download options (MP4, MP3, and more).

whyDownload.title: Why Download YouTube Shorts?
whyDownload.description: Downloading Shorts lets you watch your favorite clips offline, save inspiration for later, and keep useful tutorials or snippets without relying on mobile data. Since Shorts are short and vertical, they're ideal for quick viewing on phones.

verticalFormat.title: Vertical 9:16 Format (No Rotation Issues)
verticalFormat.description: Many tools treat Shorts like regular videos, which can cause sideways playback or incorrect framing. SSVID is built for Shorts, helping you keep the vertical 9:16 layout for smoother playback on mobile devices. If you want to download standard YouTube videos instead, use Download YouTube MP4.

items.question: What is the difference between YouTube Shorts and normal YouTube videos?
items.answer: YouTube Shorts are short-form videos designed for vertical viewing (often 9:16). Normal YouTube videos are typically longer and often in horizontal formats.

items.question: Can I download YouTube Shorts online without installing software?
items.answer: Yes. SSVID works fully online in your browser—no software, no extensions, and no sign-up required.

items.question: Does SSVID keep Shorts in the original vertical format?
items.answer: Yes. SSVID focuses on preserving the vertical 9:16 layout so Shorts play correctly on mobile devices.

items.question: Can I download Shorts on iPhone and Android?
items.answer: Yes. SSVID works on mobile and desktop browsers, so you can download Shorts on iOS, Android, Windows, or macOS.

items.question: Is SSVID free and unlimited for Shorts downloads?
items.answer: Yes. SSVID is free to use and allows unlimited YouTube Shorts downloads.

items.question: Can SSVID download private or restricted Shorts?
items.answer: No. Private or restricted content cannot be processed by online download tools.
